name: ennodia
description: MCP server for multi-agent review with Compare and traceable receipts

tools.name: ennodia_list_harnesses
tools.description: Discover supported local AI harnesses and report availability, runnable state, command path, version, capabilities, and adapter notes. Use first when setup or routing fails.

refresh.description: Re-scan available harnesses instead of returning the short-lived discovery cache.

tools.name: ennodia_list_skills
tools.description: Discover prompt-only skills from project, user, and built-in skill directories without returning full instruction text.

cwd.description: Optional working directory to locate project-specific skills.

tools.name: ennodia_install_skills
tools.description: Install bundled Ennodia Agent Skills into native harness skill directories. Defaults to dryRun so clients can inspect planned writes before applying them.

skillIds.description: Bundled skill IDs to install. Omit to install every bundled Ennodia skill.

harnessIds.description: Native harness skill locations to install into. Omit to target Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, and Antigravity.

scope.description: Install into project-local or user-global skill directories.

cwd.description: Project directory used when scope is project.

overwrite.description: Replace an existing skill folder at the target path.

dryRun.description: Preview planned writes without copying files. Set false to install.

tools.name: ennodia_plan
tools.description: Classify a prompt and preview the route Ennodia would take without starting any child process. Use before ennodia_run when you want to inspect routing.

prompt.description: The task to classify and route.

category.description: Optional caller-provided route category. Pass this when you know the task category; Ennodia then skips keyword classification.

includeMermaid.description: Include the presentational Mermaid route diagram.

tools.name: ennodia_estimate_budget
tools.description: Estimate the input-token budget for a planned Ennodia run and report whether optional limits would be exceeded before starting child tasks.

prompt.description: The user task to route and estimate.

category.description: Optional caller-provided route category. Pass this when you know the task category; Ennodia then skips keyword classification.

harnessId.description: Force one harness by ID for the estimate, such as opencode or claude-code.

mode.description: auto follows the planner; single estimates one selected harness; parallel estimates all candidate harnesses.

compare.description: Whether Compare should be included in the estimate. auto follows the planner.

refresh.description: Re-scan harnesses before planning the estimate.

maxOutputChars.description: Maximum characters from each successful task output assumed for Compare input.

maxEstimatedInputTokens.description: Fail before starting if the estimated run input tokens exceed this value.

maxChildTasks.description: Fail before starting if routing selects more child harness tasks than this value.

budget.description: Optional preflight budget limits for an Ennodia operation.

tools.name: ennodia_estimate_compositional_budget
tools.description: Resolve focused compositional slices to harnesses and estimate child-task and Compare budget without starting child processes.

prompt.description: Overall question or synthesis goal that every slice belongs to.

id.description: Optional stable slice ID returned with the started task. Must be unique when supplied.

title.description: Optional short human-readable label for this slice.

prompt.description: Focused task prompt for this slice.

category.description: Optional caller-provided route category for this slice. When supplied, Ennodia skips keyword classification.

harnessId.description: Optional harness ID for this slice. Omit to let Ennodia plan this slice independently.

model.description: Optional model override for this slice, passed only to harnesses that support model selection.

items.description: One focused unit of compositional work.

slices.description: Focused work slices. Each slice resolves to at most one child task.

cwd.description: Optional working directory used to validate requested native skills.

refresh.description: Re-scan harnesses before resolving slice routes.

skillIds.description: Optional list of installed native skill IDs to validate against every selected slice harness.

includeCompareEstimate.description: Include a later Compare pass in the returned preflight budget estimate.

maxOutputChars.description: Maximum characters per successful slice output assumed for a later Compare estimate.

maxEstimatedInputTokens.description: Fail before starting if the estimated run input tokens exceed this value.

maxChildTasks.description: Fail before starting if routing selects more child harness tasks than this value.

budget.description: Optional preflight budget limits for an Ennodia operation.

tools.name: ennodia_start
tools.description: Start raw child harness tasks without run-level Compare or final synthesis. Use for debugging, direct harness calls, or manual Compare workflows; prefer ennodia_run for normal end-to-end use.

prompt.description: The task to send to the selected local harness or harnesses.

category.description: Optional caller-provided route category. Pass this when you know the task category; Ennodia then skips keyword classification.

harnessId.description: Force one harness by ID, such as codex or claude-code. Omit to let Ennodia pick from the plan.

mode.description: single starts the selected or top-ranked harness; parallel starts every planned candidate.

cwd.description: Working directory for child harness commands.

model.description: Optional model override passed through to harnesses that support it.

timeoutMs.description: Per-task timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to the task manager timeout and is capped at one hour.

refresh.description: Re-scan harnesses before planning and starting tasks.

skillIds.description: Optional list of skill IDs to apply to the prompt before starting the task.

maxEstimatedInputTokens.description: Fail before starting if the estimated run input tokens exceed this value.

maxChildTasks.description: Fail before starting if routing selects more child harness tasks than this value.

budget.description: Optional preflight budget limits for an Ennodia operation.

tools.name: ennodia_start_compositional
tools.description: Start one focused child task per slice for compositional reviews. Poll the returned task IDs, then pass useful completed task IDs to ennodia_start_compare for synthesis.

prompt.description: Overall question or synthesis goal that every slice belongs to.

id.description: Optional stable slice ID returned with the started task. Must be unique when supplied.

title.description: Optional short human-readable label for this slice.

prompt.description: Focused task prompt for this slice.

category.description: Optional caller-provided route category for this slice. When supplied, Ennodia skips keyword classification.

harnessId.description: Optional harness ID for this slice. Omit to let Ennodia plan this slice independently.

model.description: Optional model override for this slice, passed only to harnesses that support model selection.

items.description: One focused unit of compositional work.

slices.description: Focused work slices. Each slice starts at most one child task.

cwd.description: Working directory for child harness commands.

timeoutMs.description: Per-slice task timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to the task manager timeout and is capped at one hour.

refresh.description: Re-scan harnesses before resolving slice routes.

skillIds.description: Optional list of installed native skill IDs to ask every selected slice harness to use.

includeCompareEstimate.description: Include a later Compare pass in the returned preflight budget estimate.

maxOutputChars.description: Maximum characters per successful slice output assumed for a later Compare estimate.

maxEstimatedInputTokens.description: Fail before starting if the estimated run input tokens exceed this value.

maxChildTasks.description: Fail before starting if routing selects more child harness tasks than this value.

budget.description: Optional preflight budget limits for an Ennodia operation.

tools.name: ennodia_run
tools.description: Start a high-level Ennodia orchestration. Use this as the default entrypoint: it plans routing, starts one or more local harness tasks, optionally compares successful outputs, and returns a run ID. Runs usually take minutes; poll ennodia_get_run with sensible spacing and trust remainingMs/etaConfidence instead of aborting early.

prompt.description: The user task to route to local AI harnesses.

category.description: Optional caller-provided route category. Pass this when you know the task category; Ennodia then skips keyword classification.

harnessId.description: Force one harness by ID, such as codex or claude-code. Omit to let Ennodia plan.

mode.description: auto follows the planner; single runs one selected harness; parallel runs all candidate harnesses.

compare.description: Whether to run Compare after tasks finish. auto compares when the planner sees value and at least two tasks produce output.

cwd.description: Working directory for child harness commands.

model.description: Optional model override passed to the selected task harnesses.

timeoutMs.description: Per-task timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to the task manager timeout and is capped at one hour.

refresh.description: Re-scan harnesses before planning the run.

judgeHarnessId.description: Harness to use as the Compare judge. Omit to use the default priority: claude-code, codex, antigravity, opencode, kilo, kiro, cline, then hermes-agent.

judgeModel.description: Optional model override for the Compare judge.

synthesizerHarnessId.description: Harness that writes the final synthesized answer. Defaults to the judge harness selection.

synthesizerModel.description: Optional model override for the Compare synthesizer.

maxOutputChars.description: Maximum characters from each successful task output to pass into Compare. Use 0 to suppress candidate text.

skillIds.description: Optional list of skill IDs to apply to the prompt before planning and running child tasks.

maxEstimatedInputTokens.description: Fail before starting if the estimated run input tokens exceed this value.

maxChildTasks.description: Fail before starting if routing selects more child harness tasks than this value.

budget.description: Optional preflight budget limits for an Ennodia operation.

tools.name: ennodia_list_runs
tools.description: List high-level Ennodia runs started by this MCP server process.

includeEvents.description: Include bounded run event history for each listed run.

maxEvents.description: Maximum run events to include per run when includeEvents is true.

maxAnswerChars.description: Maximum final-answer characters to include per run. Use 0 to omit answer text.

tools.name: ennodia_history
tools.description: Read terminal run receipts persisted under the local Ennodia history directory. Use after a restart to inspect previous final answers and Compare disagreement analysis.

limit.description: Maximum persisted run snapshots to return, newest first.

tools.name: ennodia_get_run
tools.description: Inspect run status, selected harnesses, child task IDs, Compare ID, final answer, events, and ETA.

maxEvents.description: Maximum run events to include. Use 0 to omit events.

maxAnswerChars.description: Maximum final-answer characters to include. Use 0 to omit answer text.

tools.name: ennodia_cancel_run
tools.description: Cancel a high-level run and any active child task or Compare.

tools.name: ennodia_list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks started by this Ennodia MCP server process.

includeOutput.description: Include bounded stdout and stderr previews for each task.

includeEvents.description: Include bounded task event history for each task.

maxOutputChars.description: Maximum stdout and stderr characters to include per task. Use 0 to omit output text.

maxEvents.description: Maximum task events to include per task when includeEvents is true.

tools.name: ennodia_get_compositional_status
tools.description: Inspect a batch of compositional shard tasks, group running and terminal states, and return Compare-ready successful task IDs.

items.description: Task ID returned by a compositional start.

prompt.description: Optional synthesis prompt to include in the returned compareNext object.

minSuccessfulTasksForCompare.description: Minimum successful non-empty task outputs required before compareReady is true.

includeOutput.description: Include bounded stdout and stderr previews for each known task.

maxOutputChars.description: Maximum stdout and stderr characters to include per task when includeOutput is true.

tools.name: ennodia_start_compare
tools.description: Compare completed Ennodia task outputs or caller-supplied responses. Runs a judge pass, then a synthesizer pass, and returns a Compare ID to inspect with ennodia_get_compare.

prompt.description: Original user task or question the candidate responses answer.

taskIds.description: IDs of completed tasks from this server session to include as candidates.

responses.description: Freeform text responses to compare directly when you do not have task IDs.

id.description: Stable candidate ID used in judge analysis.

metadata.description: Optional structured metadata to retain with the candidate.

judgeHarnessId.description: Harness to use as the Compare judge. Omit to use the default priority: claude-code, codex, antigravity, opencode, kilo, kiro, cline, then hermes-agent.

judgeModel.description: Optional model override for the Compare judge.

synthesizerHarnessId.description: Harness that writes the final synthesized answer. Defaults to the judge harness selection.

synthesizerModel.description: Optional model override for the Compare synthesizer.

cwd.description: Working directory for judge and synthesizer child tasks.

timeoutMs.description: Per-child timeout for judge and synthesizer tasks in milliseconds, capped at one hour.

maxOutputChars.description: Maximum characters from each task output to include as a Compare candidate. Use 0 to suppress task output text.

maxEstimatedInputTokens.description: Fail before starting if the estimated run input tokens exceed this value.

maxChildTasks.description: Fail before starting if routing selects more child harness tasks than this value.

budget.description: Optional preflight budget limits for an Ennodia operation.

tools.name: ennodia_list_compares
tools.description: List Compare runs started by this Ennodia MCP server process.

includeCandidates.description: Include bounded candidate response previews for each Compare.

maxCandidateChars.description: Maximum characters to include per candidate. Use 0 to omit candidate text.

maxEvents.description: Maximum Compare events to include when includeEvents is true.

tools.name: ennodia_get_compare
tools.description: Inspect Compare status, candidate inputs, judge analysis, final synthesis, child task IDs, and ETA.

compareId.description: Compare ID returned by ennodia_start_compare or ennodia_run.

maxCandidateChars.description: Maximum characters to include per candidate. Use 0 to omit candidate text.

maxEvents.description: Maximum Compare events to include. Use 0 to omit events.

tools.name: ennodia_cancel_compare
tools.description: Cancel a running Compare and its active child task.

compareId.description: Compare ID returned by ennodia_start_compare or ennodia_run.

tools.name: ennodia_get_task
tools.description: Inspect task status, captured output, events, and ETA.

taskId.description: Task ID returned by ennodia_start, ennodia_run, or Compare.

includeOutput.description: Include bounded stdout and stderr previews.

maxOutputChars.description: Maximum stdout and stderr characters to include. Use 0 to omit output text.

maxEvents.description: Maximum task events to include. Use 0 to omit events.

tools.name: ennodia_cancel_task
tools.description: Cancel a running task by task ID.

taskId.description: Task ID returned by ennodia_start, ennodia_run, or Compare.
